synopsis:
Freed from carbonite, Valin and Jysella Horn appear cured of the Force psychosis but secretly remain afflicted, hiding it while Cilghal and Tekli stay suspicious. Luke and Ben Skywalker, with Vestara Khai, track the dark-side entity Abeloth to Nam Chorios, where she intends to seize control of the Theran Listeners and the crystalline tsils. Luke seeks out the Theran Listeners to learn mnemotherapy, a rare ability to extract and transfer memories, expecting it will be crucial against Abeloth.

On Coruscant, the long conflict between the Jedi Order and Chief of State Natasi Daala comes to a head. As an Imperial-Kuati conspiracy moves to overthrow her, the Jedi strike simultaneously, capturing Daala and installing a triumvirate to run the Galactic Alliance, with Saba Sebatyne revealed as acting Grand Master. Han and Leia Solo help bring the newly freed slave world Klatooine into the Alliance, thwarting a Sith plot that endangers Allana. Tahiri Veila is found guilty and sentenced to death for killing Gilad Pellaeon, but escapes in the chaos when Boba Fett breaks Daala out of prison.

On Nam Chorios, Luke confronts Abeloth and uses mnemotherapy to free the soul of Callista Ming, long absorbed within the entity, letting her die at peace. Vestara kills a tsil to unleash a debilitating Force wave, allowing the group to escape as the Jedi StealthX fleet battles the Sith. Abeloth and Ship flee, gravely wounded, and Abeloth, grieving Callista, proposes an alliance to Gavar Khai's Sith fleet to destroy Luke and his allies.
title: Conviction
